markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

User requested creation and deployment of a professional iris analysis web application combining AI image analysis with personality and spiritual insights. Manus developed a full-stack application with React frontend, Flask backend, OpenCV-based analysis, and payment gateway integration. Initial deployment faced connectivity issues, requiring troubleshooting and redeployment to deliver a fully functional live website.


## Context & Intent

User wanted a complete, professional web application for iris analysis that would provide psychology and spiritual advice based on iris patterns, colors, and shapes. The app needed to be immediately accessible online without requiring user installation.


## What Was Done

Developed complete web application with AI-powered iris analysis, modern UI, payment system, and comprehensive reporting features. Initially deployed with connectivity issues, then redeployed successfully with permanent live URL.


## Outputs Produced

- [web_application] IrisInsight Pro — Live iris analysis web app at rqlehnbk.manus.space
- [source_code] Full Stack Application — React frontend with Tailwind CSS, Flask backend with OpenCV
- [deployment] Live Website — Permanently deployed iris analysis service

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Used React + Tailwind for modern UI
- Implemented Flask backend with OpenCV for image analysis
- Created three-tier subscription model
- Focused on professional design and user experience

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Complete full-stack development approach
- Professional UI design with animations
- Comprehensive analysis features combining technical and spiritual insights
Failed / suboptimal:

- Initial deployment had connectivity issues
- Required redeployment to resolve server problems
Discoveries:

- Sandbox environment can have connectivity issues requiring alternative deployment strategies

## Challenges & Blockers

- Initial server connectivity issues preventing website access
- Deployment environment instability

## Open Questions

- How to ensure long-term stability of deployed applications
- Integration with real payment processors for production use

## Next Steps

- Monitor website performance and stability
- Consider real AI model integration for actual iris analysis
- Implement real payment gateway for commercial launch
